title: Linux Engineer - Singaporean Only
description:
Role Summary


We are looking for a Linux Systems Engineer who will take the lead in deploying and rolling out Linux-based solutions across enterprise environments. This role is ideal for someone passionate about building systems from the ground up, ensuring they are secure, scalable, and production-ready. You’ll work closely with infrastructure and application teams, driving end-to-end deployments that power critical business operations.


Job Responsibilities

  • Deploy and configure Linux servers across on-premises and virtualized environments.
  • Automate installation, configuration, and patching to streamline deployments.
  • Test, validate, and optimize systems for performance, stability, and security.
  • Support integration with VMware, KVM, and Windows environments.
  • Document and standardize deployment processes for repeatability and compliance.
  • Collaborate with vendors, project teams, and internal stakeholders to ensure smooth rollouts.
  • Contribute to system design discussions, particularly around deployment strategy and scalability.

Qualification & Experience

  • Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology or equivalent.
  • Min 2 years of experience with Linux deployment and system builds.
  • Strong knowledge of Linux installation, configuration, updates, and troubleshooting.
  • Hands-on experience with KVM/VMware virtualization.
  • This role is only open to Singaporeans due to security clearance purposes.
  • Solid networking knowledge (configuration, troubleshooting).
  • Diploma/Degree in Computer Science or related field.
  • Initiative-driven, detail-oriented, with strong communication skills.
  • Bonus: exposure to Windows Server or cloud environments.

postedCompany.description:
Newtone Consulting is an IT recruitment and sourcing specialist, delivering tailored talent solutions since 2013. We partner with organisations to identify, select, and onboard the right IT professionals.

With deep expertise across the IT landscape, we recruit for a wide range of roles, from functional business analysts to highly specialised technical architects. Our consultants bring strong IT backgrounds and years of recruitment experience, enabling them to understand complex technical requirements and match them with the right talent efficiently and accurately.

We work with leading multinational clients across banking, technology, fintech, industrial, infrastructure, and retail sectors, supporting their growth and critical digital initiatives through high-quality IT talent.
postedCompany.name: NEWTONE CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
